title: This Railroad Stock Just Saw Profits Jump 27%
text: Despite staffing challenges and union negotiations in a slowing economy, Norfolk Southern remains optimistic.

title: Second railroad union votes down deal needed to avert nationwide strike
text: A second rail union, Brotherhood of Railroad Signalmen, voted overwhelmingly to reject a deal with railroad companies needed to avert a nationwide strike.

title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Top, Rise Y/Y
text: High costs limit bottom-line growth at Norfolk Southern (NSC) in Q322.

title: A Long-Term Investor's View On Norfolk Southern
text: Norfolk Southern is dealing with declining economic growth, high inflation, and post-pandemic operating issues. Despite these challenges, the third quarter was a success. Hiring is ahead of plan, pricing is strong, and the operating performance was better than expected.

title: Union Pacific Vs. Norfolk Southern: Which One Is The Better Stock?
text: Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern are two very high-quality railroad companies. Their shares, which are currently almost 30% below their 52-week highs, warrant an in-depth comparative analysis. In this article, I will compare the two companies in terms of profitability, growth, shareholder returns, and balance sheet quality.

title: Norfolk Southern Corp (NSC) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Norfolk Southern Corp (NYSE:NSC ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2022 8:45 AM ET Company Participants Luke Nichols - IR Alan Shaw - President, CEO & Director Cynthia Sanborn - EVP & COO Claude Elkins - EVP & CMO Mark George - EVP, Finance & CFO Conference Call Participants Justin Long - Stephens Christian Wetherbee - Citigroup Scott Group - Wolfe Research Ariel Rosa - Crédit Suisse Brandon Oglenski - Barclays Bank Thomas Wadewitz - UBS Jonathan Chappell - Evercore ISI Cherilyn Radbourne - TD Securities Jordan Alliger - Goldman Sachs Group Benjamin Nolan - Stifel, Nicolaus & Company Kenneth Hoexter - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Amit Mehrotra - Deutsche Bank Bascome Majors - Susquehanna Jeffrey Kauffman - Vertical Research Partners Walter Spracklin - RBC Capital Markets Jason Seidl - Cowen and Company Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Norfolk Southern Corporation Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Norfolk Southern (NSC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 12.64% and 3.83%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Norfolk Southern reports third quarter 2022 financial results
text: Posts quarterly financial records, improved service for customers ATLANTA , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) today announced third quarter 2022 financial results which included records for railway operating revenues, income from railway operations, net income, and diluted earnings per share. Third quarter railway operating revenue was $3.3 billion, income from railway operations was $1.3 billion, net income was $958 million, and diluted earnings per share were $4.10.

title: Will Norfolk Southern Stock Move Higher Following Q3 Results?
text: Norfolk Southern (NYSE: NSC) is scheduled to report its Q3 2022 results on Wednesday, October 26.

title: 3 Blue-Chip Transportation Stocks on Investors' Watch List
text: Dividend-paying Transportation stocks like UPS, Union Pacific (UNP) and Norfolk Southern (NSC) should be on an investor's radar amid the prevalent uncertain scenario.

title: Railroad strike could be back on table as third largest union rejects deal brokered by Biden administration
text: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — The U.S.'s third largest railroad union rejected a deal with employers Monday, renewing the possibility of a strike that could cripple the economy.

title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Could Be a Great Choice

title: Norfolk Southern to Announce Q3 2022 Earnings Results on October 26
text: ATLANTA , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) will announce its third quarter financial results during a live conference call and internet webcast at 8:45 a.m. ET on Wednesday, October 26, 2022.
